title: Escape from Enies Lobby: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm... seeing a miracle right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been a shipwright for many years,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It lived a very admirable life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: The bottom of the sea is dark

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There's no way he could... endure this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And what do you say to that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's fully prepared for this moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: The making of the pirate ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Look! The Merry is so scratched up!!
